product: Scoped personal access tokens will soon be available by default for workspaces…
tagline: Scoped personal access tokens will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in late May 2026.
what_it_does: Scoped personal access tokens will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in late May 2026. Scoped personal access tokens restrict a PAT's permissions to specific API operations by assigning one or more API scopes, instead of granting the creating identity's full workspace access. Databricks personal access tokens (PATs) let you authenticate to resources and APIs at the workspace level.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

key_takeaway: Scoped personal access tokens will be available by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled in late May 2026.
